- For **ProteinGroups.txt :** It requires tabular input (e.g. txt files) as generated by quantitative analysis softwares of raw mass spectrometry data, such as [MaxQuant](http://www.nature.com/nbt/journal/v26/n12/full/nbt.1511.html) or [IsobarQuant](http://www.nature.com/nprot/journal/v10/n10/full/nprot.2015.101.html)
- For **ExperimentalDesign.txt :** Data frame, Experimental design with 'label', 'condition' and 'replicate' information. `Note that` : you need not upload the ExperimentalDesign.txt when `Sample annotation` is setted to `Parse from columns`
  + **label :** Label names
  + **condition :** Experimental conditions
  + **replicate :** Replicate number

- For **load saved result RData :** If you `Save the RData` for the first analysis, and when you upload your saved `results.RData` here next time, you can get the same result as before
